response.justification: Candidate has strong hands-on software engineering breadth (13+ years across web, mobile, desktop, embedded) and some adjacent developer-tooling experience (CI/CD setup, test frameworks like Trial, Selenium course, AI-agent tooling), but the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership tenure, which is a hard requirement (2+ years) for this role. There is also no demonstrated mobile-platform engineering productivity work or experience leading organizational change. The profile reads as a senior IC, not an engineering manager.
strengths: Long engineering tenure with developer-tooling and test-automation exposure (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, Selenium course, CI/CD setup)
Strong technical breadth across languages, platforms, and infrastructure relevant to build/test tooling
Demonstrated knowledge sharing through workshops, talks, and course creation
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report leadership experience (role requires 2+ years)
No demonstrated mobile-platform ecosystem experience at the depth this role targets
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning a mid-term technical roadmap for a team

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test automation background
